sections.paragraph: with suff. תֹּאֲרֹו (for תָּֽֽאֳרֹו), תָּאֳרָם m., form of body, 1Sa 28:14 Lam 4:8. יְפַת תֹּאַר, יְפֵה beautiful of form; commonly used of persons, Gen 29:17 39:6 and of animals, Gen 41:18, 19 Gen 41:19. Specially a beautiful form, Isa 53:2 1Sa 16:18, אִישׁ תֹּאַר “a man of form,” i.e. formosus, beautiful.
